# IGStoryPeek

> Free Instagram analytics and content tools. Analyze public profiles, track engagement trends, and view stories — no login required.

IGStoryPeek is a free web-based platform that lets users view, analyze, and download publicly available Instagram content without needing to log in or create an account.

## Main Features

### Profile & Analytics
- User Search: Look up any public Instagram profile by username — view bios, follower counts, and profile details instantly
- Activity Analyzer: Discover posting patterns, engagement timing, content format performance, and competitor benchmarking

### Content Viewer
- Stories Viewer: Watch any public Instagram story privately without an account
- Post Viewer: Browse public Instagram feeds, captions, and engagement metrics without logging in
- Highlights Viewer: Browse saved story collections and highlight albums from any public profile

### Downloader
- Stories Downloader: Save public Instagram stories in original HD quality for offline viewing

## Pricing
- Free plan available with basic features
- Pro plans from $9.99/month with advanced analytics and unlimited downloads
- Full pricing at https://www.igstorypeek.com/pricing
